label: Background + logo, fades in and back out over the live app
//: A branded card — the theme's background image with the theme's logo placed on it — that fades up over the running app and then fades away again, leaving the app it was always sitting on top of. `asset` names are resolved through the active theme's `assets` block, so a theme only supplies the two images and inherits the choreography.
//logo: x/y place the logo's CENTRE on the background; width is relative to the screen. Any CSS length works — a theme may override the whole block via openScreen.logo.
